violations.text: The sales floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

Walk in cooler was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS food items were voluntarily disposed of (Chicken, pork, beef, fish, soup, cooked veggies all tempted at 50 DF voluntarily disposed of. Raw items were moved from unit and cooked. Establishment is working with HVAC. Establishment is not to put any TCS food items in walk in cooler until unit is fixed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
The sales floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
The hood systems was observed with and excess of debris. Hood systems must remain clean to sight and touch. New Violation Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

Walk in cooler was observed held at 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS food items were voluntarily disposed of (Chicken, pork, tripe, cow liver, goat, yuca, beef, pork chows, potatoes carrots eggs, soup, beans, and ham, pasta salad all tempted at 52 DF voluntarily disposed of. Raw items were moved from unit and cooked. Establishment placed call to HVAC service. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024

Prepared food items was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings and fruit flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective action - establishment is to continue working with pest control, establishment is to clean any and all droppings, establishment is to eliminate source of flies and work with pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

The condensate from the walk in refrigeration unit is draining onto the floor. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment placed service call. The basement was observed with an excess of standing water, establishments must be free of standing water. Establishment is to work to address areas of standing water. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024
The sales floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
The hood systems was observed with and excess of debris. Hood systems must remain clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024

Raw animal foods were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. No cross-contamination observed during time of inspection - food items were covered and protected. Establishment moved RTE food items above raw food items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

Violation of Code: [6-501.11] The bathroom door is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Correct by 4/13/24 Areas of the sales floor are in poor condition. The physical facilities must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024 New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024

The bathroom door is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Correct by 4/13/24 Areas of the sales floor are in poor condition. The physical facilities must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Corrective Action - Establishment is to have a certified food safety manager present at all times food is being prepared. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by pans. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
Food items were observed adulterated by pests - food items were voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, blender) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. - Items were moved to the three bay, and trash. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

Prepared food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Food items prepared in advanced were voluntarily disposed of that were missing dates. Discussion with PIC stated they did not know when food was prepared. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
Opened packaged and canned goods were observed past use by date - Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings on food contact surfaces and by adulterated food items. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Establishment must clean and sanitize all kitchen equipment. Establishment must clean all droppings from premises. All store food shelving must be cleaned and sanitized. Establishment is to have pest control do a full evaluation of the premises, pest control is to be increased. Reports are to be left on premises for inspector to review. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
Food items were observed uncovered in the chest freezer. Food items must be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
The covers of the chest freezers in the basement were observed broken. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk in cooler (ceiling) the non food contact surfaces of the three bay have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024

Water was observed gathering in a bucket in the basement, all structural leaks must be fixed. Water was observed accumulated in a broken chest freezer. Establishment must eliminate standing water, and repair leaks. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024
The toilet in the restroom was observed with the water from the back leaking in to a bucket. Restrooms must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024
The floors in the kitchen area, back dump sink area, and through out the store are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023
